Argument Reference

  • compartment_id - The OCID of the compartment to create the endpoint in.
  • model_id - Changing this field forces a new resource.
  • dedicated_ai_cluster_id - Changing this field forces a new resource.
  • display_name - (Updatable) A user-friendly name for the endpoint.
  • description - (Updatable) An optional description of the endpoint.
  • content_moderation_config - (Updatable) Content moderation configuration for the endpoint.
  • freeform_tags - (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • defined_tags - (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
